Hero.headline: Capital for SMEs to grow. Access for the next-generation investor.
Hero.sub: Indonesia's first equity-crowdfunding platform integrated with SME bank accounts. Invest from Rp100,000, real-time transparency, 100% equity-share.

Footer.disclaimer: Modalin is currently applying for an LUDBTI provider license under POJK 16/2021 and POJK 22/2024.

Auth.demo: Demo accounts: andi@inv.id, admin@modalin.id, or any SME owner. Password: Demo123!
